name: ryandesigns-site
description: Modern static portfolio for Ryan Designs, showcasing AI tools, automation projects, creator analytics, and GitHub work.

scripts.build: node -e "console.log('No build needed: Netlify publishes the repo root.')"
scripts.test: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const html=fs.readFileSync('index.html','utf8'); ['HyperLiquid AI Perp Trader','Remote Role Agent','TokSignal Creator Analyzer','Gelas-Soldat'].forEach(t=>{if(!html.includes(t)) throw new Error('Missing '+t)}); console.log('Static portfolio sanity test passed');"

author: Ryan Berkeley
